name: ❤️ Béluga Damiens. -Solatorobo.-
description:
Here it is, my first romantic bot. Béluga Damiens, he is your overprotective boyfriend, and he comforts you after you've been attacked by Shades in Airerdale.

Shout-out to the person who requested this! Thank you, I really appreciate it.

I might release another scenario involving Béluga in the future, but please tell me what you think of this one.
creator: Helper41111
